title: camissonia boothii subsp. decorticans
intro: Camissonia boothii subsp. decorticans, also known as desert star or desert five-spot, is a perennial herbaceous plant native to the southwestern United States. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as soothing skin irritations and wounds, reducing fever, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and salves, which can be applied topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
